nasb.text: For this purpose also I labor, striving according to His power, which mightily works within me.

esv.text: For this I toil, struggling with all his energy that he powerfully works within me.

cnv.text: 我也為了這事勞苦，按著他用大能在我心中運行的動力，竭力奮鬥。

ccb.text: 为此，我按着祂在我身上运行的大能尽心竭力，不辞劳苦。

csbs.text: 我也为此劳苦，藉着他在我里面的大能作为而争战。
